channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Slay The Spire 2 Promises To Patch Out 1 Billion HP Exploit As It Sells A Whopping 3 Million Copies In Just One Week - Kotaku
item.description:
1. Slay The Spire 2 Promises To Patch Out 1 Billion HP Exploit As It Sells A Whopping 3 Million Copies In Just One Week  Kotaku
  2. Slay the Spire 2 is a bit too familiar for its own good  Ars Technica
  3. 'Even though I threw out my back from overworking, I'm feeling high in spirits': Slay the Spire 2 sold 3 million copies in its first week  PC Gamer
  4. Fear not, phobia havers, Slay the Spire 2 will be catering to you in a future update  Rock Paper Shotgun
  5. 15 March 2026 - Slay The Spire 2 Is A Major Success, Xenonauts 2 Release Date, Headquarters Cold War Out This Week And Much More  Strategy and Wargaming
